base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of flash_man — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Flash Man — time-stop boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Flash Man — time-stop boss; gives Time Stopper weapon
